overview: The user approaches the Safety Gloves, demonstrating understanding of proper PPE usage and safety protocols.

implementation_steps.title: Create Safety Gloves Object
implementation_steps.what: Place a 3D model of industrial safety gloves in the scene at a safe distance from the user's starting position, with clear visibility and accessibility.
implementation_steps.why: Provide an easily identifiable target for the user to approach and interact with, promoting engagement and understanding of PPE importance.

required_knowledge.description: Create or import a 3D model of industrial safety gloves with accurate textures and materials.
Configure the scene to accommodate the gloves object, including lighting, camera angles, and collision detection.

implementation_steps.title: Setup Approach Interaction
implementation_steps.what: Implement a spatial interaction (e.g., grab, pick-up) that allows the user to approach and interact with the Safety Gloves object.
implementation_steps.why: Enable users to engage with the gloves in an immersive and intuitive manner, promoting exploration and understanding of PPE usage.

required_knowledge.description: Use the XR Interaction Toolkit to create a grab interaction that allows users to pick up the gloves object.
Configure collision detection to prevent the user from passing through the gloves object or other scene elements.

implementation_steps.title: Provide Feedback and Haptic Cues
implementation_steps.what: Implement visual, auditory, or haptic feedback to provide users with a sense of accomplishment when they successfully approach and interact with the Safety Gloves object.
implementation_steps.why: Enhance user engagement by providing clear and immediate feedback on their actions, promoting a sense of satisfaction and understanding.

implementation_steps.title: Test and Refine
implementation_steps.what: Thoroughly test the approach interaction with the Safety Gloves object to ensure it is intuitive, accessible, and free from errors.
implementation_steps.why: Verify that the interaction meets VR best practices and user expectations, making necessary adjustments for optimal performance.
